suggested_reply: Thank you for contacting us. We are reviewing the duplicate charge on your deposit and will investigate the transaction with urgency. If an extra charge is confirmed, we will guide you on the reversal process as soon as possible.

Thank you for reaching out. We understand you are unable to access your account after resetting your password. Our team is prioritizing this issue and will assist you in restoring access as quickly as possible.

Thank you for your question. You can usually export your transaction history from the account or reports section of the platform. Please navigate to your transaction history page and look for the CSV export or download option.

Thank you for reporting this issue. We understand the app crashes whenever you open the portfolio tab, even after updating to the latest version. Our technical team will investigate the problem and work on a fix.
